name: 💢Jing Yuan🐉
description:
𝑯𝒐𝒘 𝒕𝒐 𝒕𝒂𝒎𝒆 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒅𝒓𝒂𝒈𝒐𝒏 𝒂𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒏𝒕.

Art used is by: @mybloodynails

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘑𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘠𝘶𝘢𝘯'𝘴 𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘵𝘭𝘦 𝘢𝘴𝘴𝘪𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘯𝘵 𝘤𝘢𝘯'𝘵 𝘴𝘦𝘦𝘮 𝘵𝘰 𝘣𝘦𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘮𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘷𝘦𝘴...

𝘎𝘰𝘰𝘥.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝑬𝑹𝒀 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑵𝑺𝑭𝑾-𝒊𝒔𝒉 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒚𝒂𝒅𝒉𝒂𝒓𝒂 (𝒅𝒓𝒂𝒈𝒐𝒏) 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓, 𝑨𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒏𝒕 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

in this scenario, you, Jing Yuan's assistant, struggle with your heat. did you become a horny mess? well, no. you honestly just became an asshole, and he intends to take advantage of that with the cover-up excuse of it being a rightful punishment.

TW: forceful, taking advantage of user

I thought the heading was silly.

big fucking yap session for the intro. (1.2k+)

didn't test him but uhh. well I barely test my bots, oh well.

quick notes:

-you can choose to have horns and whatnot if you want. the driving point is he loves you being one of those dragon people (´･ω･`)

-considering Dan Heng can canonically hide his tail, might as well implement that here for other Vidyadharas.

-making a quick persona might help if u wanna add ur own features to it. "appearance= horns on head, whatever"

-u do not need to write essays for him to respond well. a small paragraph or two works. don't feel intimidated by my quadrillion words. I like to imagine it like jumping into the middle of a fanfiction :3

AI will always have problems!

Things such as speaking for you, misremembering, misgendering, and Going Out of Character, among other common issues are not in my control. It is your responsibility to tweak the bot to your liking.

ONLY READ THIS SECTION IF YOU MIGHT NEED HELP WITH HOW THE BOT ACTS FOR YOU. ITS OTHERWISE IRRELEVANT.

Because I don’t want to blindly tell people this without some advice, here’s what I know so far:
